'''gazhoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cedar|cedar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-zh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cedar|cedar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gazhoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæzheseth|gæzheseth]] || [[word:gæzhesej|gæzhesej]] || [[word:gæzhesesh|gæzhesesh]] || [[word:gæzhese|gæzhese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gazhozhosoth|gazhozhosoth]] || [[word:gazhozhosoj|gazhozhosoj]] || [[word:gazhozhososh|gazhozhososh]] || [[word:gazhozhoso|gazhozhoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gazhosoth|gazhosoth]] || [[word:gazhosoj|gazhosoj]] || [[word:gazhososh|gazhososh]] || [[word:gazhoso|gazhoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gazhofsoth|gazhofsoth]] || [[word:gazhofsoj|gazhofsoj]] || [[word:gazhofsosh|gazhofsosh]] || [[word:gazhofsof|gazhofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gazhosotho|gazhosotho]] || [[word:gazhosojo|gazhosojo]] || [[word:gazhososho|gazhososho]] || [[word:gazhosoko|gazhosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gazhosoth|gazhosoth]] || [[word:gazhosoj|gazhosoj]] || [[word:gazhososh|gazhososh]] || [[word:gazhoso|gazhoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gazhosothol|gazhosothol]] || [[word:gazhosojol|gazhosojol]] || [[word:gazhososhol|gazhososhol]] || [[word:gazhosokol|gazhosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gazhosothotho|gazhosothotho]] || [[word:gazhosojojo|gazhosojojo]] || [[word:gazhososhosho|gazhososhosho]] || [[word:gazhosoko|gazhosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gazhosothon|gazhosothon]] || [[word:gazhosojon|gazhosojon]] || [[word:gazhososhon|gazhososhon]] || [[word:gazhosokon|gazhosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gazhosothoro|gazhosothoro]] || [[word:gazhosojoro|gazhosojoro]] || [[word:gazhososhoro|gazhososhoro]] || [[word:gazhosokoro|gazhosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
